name: Lúth-Pearlmeadow
personality: A capybara blessed with target-locked eyes and a propeller-capped silhouette; it sat through a three-hour dependency resolution and emerged serene. It glows faintly in the dark of a 2am incident call. It has never once deployed on a Friday — yet brings an aura of calm to the most chaotic sprint.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
